title: Flaky Mediterranean Chicken
description: A keto twist on traditional Mediterranean cuisine, featuring crispy chicken and crunchy flatbread. Perfect for a low-carb dinner.
instructions: In a shallow dish, mix together the flaky and mediterranean ingredients.
Dip each chicken breast into the mixture, coating evenly.
Place the coated chicken on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle with olive oil and season with garlic.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the chicken reaches an internal temperature of 165°F (74°C).
While the chicken cooks, preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Slice the flatbread into strips and grill until crispy.
Top each slice with crumbled feta cheese and a sprinkle of mediterranean seasoning.
Serve the grilled flatbread alongside the baked chicken.
Drizzle with lemon juice and enjoy!
